2026-0387
2026-04-29FINCanadian International Trade Tribunal ActAppointment of a Vice-chairperson of the Canadian International Trade TribunalAppointment of Eric Wildhaber of Gatineau, Quebec, to be Vice-chairperson of the Canadian International Trade Tribunal, to hold office during good behaviour for a term of five years, effective May 11, 2026.N/A
subject: Appointment of a Vice-chairperson of the Canadian International Trade Tribunal
precis: Appointment of Eric Wildhaber of Gatineau, Quebec, to be Vice-chairperson of the Canadian International Trade Tribunal, to hold office during good behaviour for a term of five years, effective May 11, 2026.
